intro: A short story visual novel with ASMR, starring the cat VTuber Serena Hanazono.
description:
A Sweet Love Story with a Cat-Eared Client.


◆Synopsis
"Serena. My name is Serena Hanazono...!"

A cat-eared client is seeking the services of your handyman business.
She introduces herself as Serena Hanazono, and she would like you to help her find a lost necklace.
Movie theatres, cafes, parks, amusement parks......

Together, the two of you search each possible location, but somehow it feels like a fun date......

From a simple client and handyman relationship, your bond gradually deepens.
Will you be able to find Serena's lost item?

And what will become of your relationship...?

Experience a sweet, intimate love story with Serena Hanazono.


◆Characters
・Serena Hanazono（VA: Serena Hanazono）
She visits your handyman service to recover her lost necklace.

A clumsy yet charming girl who sometimes forgets the search and enjoys the moment.
But there seems to be an important reason why she came to you specifically......


○Novel Game Brand "Rabbitfoot”
A novel game brand that delivers novel games casting active YouTubers and VTubers as game characters.
As well as using their names and nicknames, you can enjoy the different sides of your faves and feel a close connection through the novel game that you cannot experience in the usual streaming or video uploads.
